form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing fourth behind Jungle Shark at Junee over 1760m in a NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $11. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after a quick start, behind Our Ultimate Bonny at Temora over 1635m in a NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $3.30. Go well again aided by the ace draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing fourth behind Jungle Shark at Junee over 1760m in a NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $11. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after a quick start, behind Our Ultimate Bonny at Temora over 1635m in a NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $3.30. Go well again aided by the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running for the majority of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1635m after showing early speed and racing wide at Temora was 5th-7.9 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $34. Before that, 8th (Fr1) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 30 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $31. Draws well so expecting a better result this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1635m after showing early speed and racing wide at Temora was 5th-7.9 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $34. Before that, 8th (Fr1) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 30 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $31. Draws well so expecting a better result this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gear during the event, namely the near side rear carrying strap.
Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well beaten after breaking at Parkes on April 4. Before that 5th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee was 5th-9.6 at the bell, beaten 16 m by One Stunin Melody (2:14.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $11. Has the task ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, was well beaten after breaking at Parkes on April 4. Before that 5th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee was 5th-9.6 at the bell, beaten 16 m by One Stunin Melody (2:14.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $11. Has the task ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for the duration of the home straight.
Severely checked passing the 700m when Crimson Rock broke gait.
Hung in rounding the home turn. Tired over the concluding stages.
When leading the event had a tendency to hang in and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Hall Most An Angel at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $15. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Chillax at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 39 to 42 on April 4 at $13. One of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Hall Most An Angel at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $15. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Chillax at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 39 to 42 on April 4 at $13. One of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out when working forward to obtain the lead at the 1200m.
Gave ground over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr1) over 1635m after showing early pace at Temora was 3rd-3.8 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $1.90. Decent effort last start. Has claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr1) over 1635m after showing early pace at Temora was 3rd-3.8 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $1.90. Decent effort last start. Has claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room leaving the 400m when Shes Got A Reason shifted in.

form.formComment: Last start by a nose when quickly away, (Fr3) at Parkes (2:06.60) beating Mohawk Park in NR up to 38 on April 4 at $7. This is tougher.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by a nose when quickly away, (Fr3) at Parkes (2:06.60) beating Mohawk Park in NR up to 38 on April 4 at $7. This is tougher.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst was leading by 0.55 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $31. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst, beaten a nose by Gem N Em (2:04.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 52 FM on March 25 at $14. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst was leading by 0.55 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $31. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst, beaten a nose by Gem N Em (2:04.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 52 FM on March 25 at $14. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr3) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 40 m by Chillax (2:03.70) in NR 39 to 42 on April 4 at $6. At the start before solid effort when 2nd (Fr6) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 4.1 beaten a head by Lucky Zara (2:05.50) in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $19. Worked very hard last start but was going well prior so may be worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 10th (Sr3) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 40 m by Chillax (2:03.70) in NR 39 to 42 on April 4 at $6. At the start before solid effort when 2nd (Fr6) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 4.1 beaten a head by Lucky Zara (2:05.50) in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $19. Worked very hard last start but was going well prior so may be worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and broke gait approaching the 1400m when Angelic Attitude broke gait.
Raced roughly rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Potter at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 44 to 47 on March 6 at $7. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after being driven well back, behind Riverina Flash at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $21. Big chance to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Potter at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 44 to 47 on March 6 at $7. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after being driven well back, behind Riverina Flash at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $21. Big chance to break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr7) over 1730m at Bathurst, beaten 9 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:08.50) in NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $12. Before that, 5th (Fr2) over 1720m after showing early pace at Penrith, at the bell was 4th-4.81 beaten 6 m by Foresight (2:05.00) in NR up to 48 on March 12 at $8.50. Has winning claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Improved to the inside of Potter when leaving the 300m.
Held up for clear racing room until the final 100m.
